subcodes.first_line: God willing, in this divine springtime mayest thou be adorned with the raiment of love and be turned toward the Most Exalted Horizon. Thy letter hath arrived [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله در این ربیع الهی بطراز محبت مزین باش و بافق اعلی متوجه مکتوبت رسید
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
